{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>'''Swordsman Isami:''' Stats and Rewards<br>'''King Zhou:''' Rewards (and Minions?)<br>'''Doomsday Pharaoh:''' Rewards (and Minions?)<br>'''Lord Xiang Yu:''' Rewards<br>'''Dragon Jr:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''King Sejong:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''Spartan War God:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''Flying Man:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''Alexander:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''Confucius:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''Dromedary:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions<br>'''Ultimate Weapon No. 1105:''' Stats, Rewards, and Minions}}
